prestazioni: Engine swap to a K10C Boosterjet (1.0L turbocharged, 111 HP) from the Suzuki Swift Sport (2017+), retaining the Splash's M15A 5-speed manual transmission with a Sachs Performance clutch (Part #3000950001) for improved torque handling up to 200 Nm

Forced induction upgrade using a Garrett GT12 turbocharger (Part #753420-1) with a custom 3D-printed intake manifold (Suzuki OEM reference: 13210-60J00) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) tuning on 98 RON fuel

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Part #SUZ 001) specifically valved for the Splash's 2,345 mm wheelbase, paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (Part #2043.120) and Whiteline front sway bar (Part #BKR94X) to reduce body roll by 35%
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (Splash-specific, designed by TRA Kyoto) with carbon fiber front fenders (Part #TRA-SP-001) and rear quarter panels (Part #TRA-SP-002), increasing track width by 40mm per side
Seibon carbon fiber hood (Part #CF-SUZ-SPL-01) with integrated NACA ducts for K10C intercooler airflow, paired with a custom rear diffuser (Part #VERTEX-SPL-003) in 3K twill weave carbon fiber

Enkei PF07 wheels (15x7 +38 offset) in Hyper Black with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (195/50R15), wrapped in custom vinyl livery by Avery Dennison (Matte Gunmetal with Suzuki Racing Heritage stripes)
